canonical_question: How do sandbox/test environments differ across ERPs - provisioning, refresh cycles, limitations?
aliases: Which ERP has the best sandbox for testing?
ERP test environment provisioning and refresh cycles
Sandbox limitations across Salesforce SAP Oracle NetSuite Dynamics 365
constraints: Salesforce Full sandbox refresh limited to once per 29 days
SAP S/4HANA Cloud PE does not support traditional client copies
Oracle ERP Cloud refresh requires version/patch matching between source and target
NetSuite OAuth tokens and app authorizations wiped on every sandbox refresh
Business Central has no in-place sandbox refresh — must delete and recreate
Workday overwrites sandbox every Friday night — uncommitted config is lost
IFS Cloud sandbox provisioning requires IFS Cloud Support engagement
Acumatica sandbox provisioning requires partner involvement

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs API rate limits for a specific ERP
User needs data migration tooling comparison

related_to.label: Salesforce REST API capabilities and rate limits

inputs_needed.question: Which ERP system are you evaluating?
What do you need the sandbox for?
